text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the break, Big Brother! Wanna know
what I did? I went to a flower shop!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the break, Big Sister! Wanna know
what I did? I went to a flower shop!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It was nice and cool inside, and I was surrounded
by flowers. It was so calming...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. For some reason, I feel like I can go all out
on today's training!
